message:
fix(ci): skip checksum job on main pushes to avoid race condition

The checksums job was failing because it ran concurrently with the
auto-checksum.yml workflow. When code changes are pushed to main:
1. CI runs and checks if checksums match (they don't, because code changed)
2. auto-checksum runs and updates the checksums

This creates a race condition where CI always fails on main pushes.

Fix: Only run the checksum consistency check on PRs. The auto-checksum
workflow handles keeping main's checksums in sync automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,9 @@ jobs:
   checksums:
     name: Checksum Consistency
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    # Only run on PRs - pushes to main are handled by auto-checksum.yml workflow
+    # This avoids race conditions where CI and auto-checksum run concurrently
+    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
